programme.desc: Phil (Donald Faison) uses Holly's assistant to help him land a star jockey as a client, but he's got his eyes on a bigger prize. Haskell (Wayne Knight) talks Stuart into selling sentimental mementos from his marriage but Stuart has trouble letting go.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell (Wayne Knight) panics when his online girlfriend surprises him with a visit because he used Phil's (Donald Faison) picture as his own. Holly discovers a homeless man in the laundry room and learns appearances can be very deceiving.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart's (David Alan Basche) work life is turned upside down when Phil (Donald Faison) sleeps with his dental assistant. Holly (Kristen Johnston) lends Eden (Kelly Stables) some outfits and soon discovers her clothes have a better social life than her.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When Stuart's favorite restaurant is about to close, he takes Phil along for one last meal, only to bump into Phil's ex-wife who is now engaged. Holly is baffled by mixed signals from a cute co-worker. Haskell starts an online traffic school

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: After failing to make an impression at the town hall meeting, Chris realizes that he needs to deliver the best campaign speech of all time if he's going to win the election for class president.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: After Chris accidentally misleads the neighborhood into thinking he and Tasha are dating, Rochelle gets quite an earful from Tasha's grandmother, Louise

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Chris is honored when Doc finally entrusts him with watching the cash register, but the situation goes from good to really bad when Chris is robbed by the neighborhood's notorious repeat-offender, Malvo.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Chris's new principal, Principal Edwards decides that the best way to solve the tension between Chris and Caruso is to pair them up as buddies on the school field trip.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: With the Academy Awards three weeks away, Victoria asks Elka to draft her Oscar acceptance speech, and Melanie and Joy fiercely compete to be Victoria's plus one.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails discover that the city in the clouds has been taken over by evil robots. Hypnobot teams up with Dr. Eggman to take over the world.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Eggman can't pay a bill for trash pickup. Sonic becomes a delivery boy for Meh Burger, guaranteeing that he'll make all deliveries in three minutes, but Dr. Eggman gets in the way.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Amy nurses one of Dr. Eggman's beebots back to health and adopts it as a pet. Eggman's old enemy, Nominatus, is back. And he sets out to take over the world once again.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Feeling the need for unconditional love, Eggman creates "Mombot." But she's overly critical and embarrasses him in front of Sonic. An endangered species wanders into Sonic's shack.

programme.title: Droners
programme.desc: When a blackout suspends the Whale Cup, Corto worries that she won't win the competition in time to save her island. She and the Tikis try to restore power to White Island by going in search of a crystal in an ancient Aqua base

programme.title: Droners
programme.desc: When Enki discovers an archived video of a young Wyatt Whale drone-racing, it quickly goes viral and soon everyone wants to race their mentor.

programme.title: Droners
programme.desc: The Tikis must team up with Team Mirage for their next race, and worse: Corto must fly in sync with Hannah or risk losing. Mouse tries to play coach and diplomat, but the two just can't get along.

programme.title: Droners
programme.desc: When Corto pays her a compliment, Debbie becomes her number one fan and even quits Team Starfish to join the Tikis. But when she realizes she's not welcome, Debbie vows to take revenge during their next race.

programme.title: Droners
programme.desc: Victoria's visiting mother replaces Mina with her as Team Siren's pilot and captain for a special race against the Tikis, following elite maelstrom rules.

programme.title: Droners
programme.desc: When Shark brags that he's the three-time winner of Paroa's Courier Trophy, Corto dares him to a race. But upon his return to Paroa, he's outed as a cheater by a gang of Shore Scrubbers.

programme.title: Droners
programme.desc: Mouse is desperate to take the Shore Scrubber's challenge, which clashes with Team Tiki's next race. Plus, Corto doesn't think she's experienced enough to take Maroro and Oro on a race that even she deems too dangerous.

programme.title: Droners
programme.desc: Corto is over the moon when the Tikis are teamed up with the Tao Twins for a relay race, but Monk grows jealous of all the attention his brother pays her.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: After an explosion at his evil lair sends him into a time loop, Eggman relives the same day over and over. / Dr. Eggman markets his brand of tomato sauce.

programme.title: Sonic Boom

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Eggman is making a movie about his life. He even tries to cast Sonic to play a lame version of Sonic. / Knuckles wants to win the village's annual Chili Dog Cook-Off. He sets out on a quest to find the perfect ingredients.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: After a bad experience at Meh Burger, Amy decides to open her restaurant. / A second Knuckles from an alternate dimension becomes stranded in their world and causes trouble for Sonic and his friends.

programme.title: Sonic Boom

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: When Sonic gets cocky about his survival skills, Sticks and Amy challenge Sonic and Knuckles to the ultimate survival skills contest. / When Knuckles is made mayor for the day, he sends the village spiraling into chaos.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: After Sonic and the gang best Eggman by using his own technology against him, Eggman swears off technology for good. / When Orbot and Cubot discover a group of rejected Cubot prototypes hiding in the jungle, they seek the help of Sonic.

programme.desc: One of Jet-Vac's eggs hatches, producing an evil baby, agreeable.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: There's a new threat to PacWorld, a debonair spy ghost named Specter. To stop him, Pac gets help from an unexpected source.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro trata de indagar la conexión de los Suárez con la mina del Chamuco. La ira de Antonia cae sobre Cecilia. David no la defiende y Francisca la recibe en su casa. Verónica manda a Gertrudis a contratar a todo el personal del nuevo hospital.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Lucía tiene leucemia. Alejandro está preocupado por la salud de su hija y Patricia lo consuela. Irene se sorprende al verlos abrazados. Verónica decide adoptar a Cecilia. Ella le jura lealtad a la señora Dantés. Gertrudis huye y Lucas la persigue.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Guerra siente que Verónica está interesada en su hijo. La desaparición de Gertrudis tiene a los Lobos preocupados. La psiquiatra cae en manos de Verónica Dantés. Ramón está muy arrepentido por la muerte del Tigre Suárez y desea contar la verdad.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Los Lobos quieren saber dónde se metió Gertrudis. Verónica niega que esté en la Fortaleza, pero la tiene encerrada en el sótano de su casa. Verónica Dantés aprovecha un beso de Alejandro para cortarle un mechón de pelo para la prueba de ADN.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Llevan a Juan a la casa de torturas de Dínora, la policía sospecha de ella y de Fernando. Óscar y Franco encuentran el auto de su hermano con manchas de sangre, están muy preocupados.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan recibe la visita de Dínora en la cabaña y se le acerca demasiado, él aprovecha para morderle con furia el labio. Fernando sospecha que Rosario se encuentra escondida en casa de Panchita.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora intimida a su prisionero, quiere que la ame a la fuerza, le dice que ella es mucho más mujer que Norma. Gabriela desea que Juan aparezca para que su hija se case y deje de sufrir.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora y su familia van a la hacienda Elizondo, Norma lo toma como una provocación. Los matones le aseguran a su patrona que Juan es un hombre fuerte y difícil, pero ella los amenaza.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Soledad y Hugo están atrapados en la mina, él cree que va a morir y quiere decirle la verdad, mientras Lucas comete una locura. Esther no sabe el valor que tiene su secreto.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Hugo tiene que evitar que Soledad se vaya de la casa cuando su peor enemigo puede atacarlos. Arturo se siente burlado por la inversión que pierde en la mina por culpa de Alcides.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Hugo sale detrás de Soledad y queda completamente desconcertado con todo lo que ella le dice. Pero él recibe la misma invitación que todos en el pueblo y sabe que no tiene tiempo que perder.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: El regreso del verdadero Alcides causa conmoción en el pueblo, la reacción de Soledad preocupa a todos. Mientras Marina quiere huir con el dinero de los inversionistas, pero Boris la descubre.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro trata de indagar la conexión de los Suárez con la mina del Chamuco. La ira de Antonia cae sobre Cecilia. David no la defiende y Francisca la recibe en su casa. Verónica manda a Gertrudis a contratar a todo el personal del nuevo hospital.

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams in Paris, France, must whip up some tasty treats and make enough Chantilly cream for four pies, as well as compete in a series of carnival games.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams reach new heights in Berlin, as they walk face-first down the exterior of a building for nearly 200 feet.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Almaty, Kazakhstan, where they brave the cold weather while perfecting a choreographed fight scene and decorate a yurt.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Hyderabad, India, where they must complete double the detours, double the road blocks and travel double the distance.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The first ever mega leg in race history continues through Hyderabad, India, where teams compete in double the detours and double the road blocks, and travel double the distance.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final five teams race through Siem Reap, Cambodia, where they face the second and final double U-turn of the season.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In the first city sprint, the final four teams race through Manila, the capital of the Philippines, where they have no road blocks and no detours.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With the $1 million prize on the line, the final three teams travel to New Orleans, where one team is crowned the winner.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Amazing Race begins its historic 33rd trip around the world when 11 new teams take off from their homes and travel to their first destination, London, England.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Amazing Race begins its historic 33rd trip around the world when 11 new teams take off from their homes and travel to their first destination, London, England.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: While racing through Scotland in February 2020, teams receive shocking and unprecedented news - for the first time in the show's history, THE AMAZING RACE suspends production due to the COVID-19 pandemic.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack and his daughter Kathaleen travel to a remote island in the Canadian Province of British Columbia to catch sight of the rare “Spirit Bear,” an all-white Black Bear. Kathaleen also takes a behind the scenes tour of a floating lodge.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Big Bear Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jack as he counts down his coolest bear experiences… trekking the elusive spirit bear in Alaska, helping return a grizzly to his home in Montana, and meeting an adorable baby black bear in New Mexico. Plus 7 more amazing bear experiences.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Sue travel Down Under to visit one of the newest and greenest animal sanctuaries in Australia. They meet up with an inspiring young couple that is running a totally sustainable B&B while caring for orphaned and injured wildlife.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he counts down six species that turn heads, like moose, elk, Cape Buffalo, proboscis monkeys and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: It's a Colorful Life
programme.desc: Wild animals flaunt their colors for all sorts of reasons: to send a warning, to attract a mate and sometimes, it’s just something they ate! Today, Jack is counting down seven amazing animals that aren’t shy about showing their true colors.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Whether they cross huge distances in a single leap like kangaroos, or gracefully soar above the waves like dolphins, or escape from predators like frogs, all of today’s countdown creatures are built to bounce, bound and jump around.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Join him as he visits some of his favorite aquariums and zoological parks, which are on a mission to help save wildlife. Meet sun bears, moose, sea lion pups, a baby rhino, and other wild animals that are all part of new zoo and aquarium programs.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In Canada's British Columbia, Jack flies by floatplane to Knight Inlet where he observes Grizzly Bears fattening up for hibernation on Pacific Salmon.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Sue head into the state-of-the-art Animal Care Center at Busch Gardens Tampa Bay to assist veterinarians performing an exam on a lion!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack as he explores Chile from top to bottom! From the unique animals of the Atacama Desert to picturesque Patagonia, come along for a journey filled with South American wildlife like flamingoes, penguins, guanacos, and much more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he meets creatures armed with superb scales, like Nile Crocodiles, Galapagos Tortoises, Thorny Devils, an African Rock Python, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack as he journeys to Lake Nakuru National Park where wildlife is prospering in Central Kenya. The thriving ecosystem is home to more than a million flamingos, endangered white and black rhinos, and the rare Rothschild giraffe.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along for an epic adventure to the tropical Caribbean Island of Curacao! Join Jungle Jack as he braves a deep diving Submarine, encounters Dolphins on the high seas, and rolls up his sleeves for Coral Reef Conservation.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Peru is brimming with unique wildlife, come along as Jungle Jack takes the adventure of a lifetime down the mighty Amazon! From Tapir and Sloth to Pink River Dolphins and Giant River Otters, this is a journey you won't want to miss!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: From the far reaches of the beautiful Samburu lands in Northern Kenya, come along with Jack for an unforgettable elephant adventure, with legendary Save the Elephants founder Iain Douglas Hamilton.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Top Dogs
programme.desc: This countdown is going to the dogs! Come along for seven of Jack’s favorite dog days from a lifetime of walking, chasing, and playing with human’s best friend.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Jack's Big Six
programme.desc: In this episode Jack counts down his experiences with some amazing animals, the leopard, cape buffalo, elephant, rhino and lion, plus one more animal Jungle Jack just couldn't leave off the list!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he meets the lucky creatures that are cared for by some of the most interesting veterinarians from across the world. Koalas, Cheetahs, Gorillas, Dogs, Eland, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Snakes Alive
programme.desc: Jack is counting down his scaliest, slitheriest, snakiest safaris ever. From green anacondas and cobras to eastern diamondbacks, puff adders, taipans and more… this Wild Countdown has teeth!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Going the Distance
programme.desc: Jungle Jack counts down nature’s long-distance animal athletes!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Living Fossils
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he meets some of the most ancient species living on Earth. Red pandas, hoatzins, koalas, crocodiles and pelicans!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Rescued

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Explosives Investigations: The crime lab is the place where science meets murder. In New York State, Eleanor Fowler opened a small package, which as mailed to her home. When she lifted the lid the box exploded killing her instantly.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some of the best clues come from the least likely places. Baffling crimes have been solved and criminals betrayed through evidence provided by insects, beer bottles, and other seemingly meaningless objects.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When abduction turns to murder, forensic science is the only key to finding justice for the victims of a kidnapper's deadly intentions.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The Naval Criminal Investigative Service uses forensic science to solve three perplexing murders and fulfill their motto: “To the living we owe respect; to the dead, we owe the truth”.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poisoners are the most devious of killers, relying on stealth or their victim's trust in order to steal their lives. They're the most dangerous creatures in the world: smart assassins. And they usually don't stop at one kill.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: There are several things that can suggest murder; jealousy, anger, poison…When everyday substances reveal hidden clues that break a homicide case, those substances become the elements of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Black Boxes: Little evidence is left after an airplane takes a deadly plunge from the sky. Investigators' best hope for an answer comes from the flight data recorder known as a “black box.”

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In Columbus, Ohio, a woman is found shot in the head. The death is ruled a suicide, but something is not right and detectives refuse to let the matter rest.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drowning deaths often look like accidents and water can destroy the scant clues the killer may have left behind. Investigators must turn to forensic science to solve cases where the victim is found dead in the water.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: George Orwell's concept of Big Brother remains in the realm of fiction. But as technology becomes more a part of our lives, it's becoming increasingly more difficult to make a move without leaving behind an electronic trace.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder…at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their capture.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Arson fires are set for their own sake, or to cover a different crime, such as murder. Think fire consumes all vital clues? Think again. Arson investigators can glean important clues from scorched rubble and ignite the unquenchable flames of justice.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In Northern California, a fire rages in the middle of the night. A woman's charred body is discovered in the smoldering aftermath.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hairs and Fibers: The tiniest filament can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways. Investigators have come to rely on forensic evidence as fine as a carpet fiber or as innocent as an eyelash to crack difficult cases.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los miembros del grupo de Alexandria están desmoralizados debido a los trágicos acontecimientos que acaban de ocurrir, pero al mismo tiempo deben prepararse para el encuentro con Negan. Éste llega antes de lo previsto y les arrebata las armas.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Afligidas por la pena y rodeadas de enemigos, Maggie y Sasha tratan de encontrar seguridad en Hilltop, pero allí no son bien recibidas por todos. En ese momento, los hombres de Negan llegan a Hilltop, adonde también se dirigen Carl y Enid.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Tara llega a un poblado en el que sólo viven unas peligrosas mujeres que no la dejarán salir de ahí fácilmente. Mientras tanto, Heath, quien la acompañaba en la búsqueda de provisiones, se pierde tratando de escapar de un ataque zombi.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carl se separa de Jesus y llega, oculto en un camión, a la guarida de los Saviors con la intención de matar a Negan. Mientras tanto, Rosita fuerza a Eugene a que le fabrique una bala y Michonne pone en marcha su propio plan contra Negan.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Negan continúa su visita a Alexandría. Spencer trata de entablar amistad con él para que lo designe líder de la comunidad, en lugar de Rick. Pero en ese momento Rick llega y se desencadena una serie de acontecimientos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Guiados por Jesus, Rick y sus compañeros llegan hasta la comunidad del rey Ezekiel, para buscar aliados en su lucha contra Negan. Allá se reencuentran con un viejo conocido.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo de Rick busca provisiones y armas con las que contentar a sus nuevos aliados en la lucha contra Negan. Mientras, Rosita está cada vez más impaciente por comenzar la guerra y en Alexandria, Tara deberá tomar una decisión trascendental.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo de Rick lleva a cabo una peligrosa misión para obtener armas de la comunidad de mujeres en la que estuvo Tara, quieran ellas o no cooperar. Además, Negan mantiene cautiva a Sasha.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.desc: The trio plants a stray cat at Furley's door, hoping he'll bend his rules and keep it. When a girl appears looking for her kitten, Furley lies and says he took it to the pound; so Jack and the girls search the pounds and bring home three different cats.

programme.desc: After a night on the town with his old navy buddies, Jack discovers he has a tattoo on his derriere. When Jack goes to the hospital to have it removed, Janet thinks he is having a vasectomy and Furley thinks he is having a sex change.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack offers to model for a beautiful art teacher and finds himself nude in front of her classroom when Furley walks in. Jack begs Furley not to tell, but the secret is out when a nude portrait of Jack appears at the Regal Beagle.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack borrows Janet's new car to drive a gorgeous model to a photo session and totals the car on the way home. He pretends to have amnesia in the hospital, but Janet gets suspicious and concocts a plan to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A customer of the flower shop names Janet in his will, and she receives a vase. His nephew, Philip, an art collector, visits Janet, and Jack thinks he lied about the value of the vase and is trying to get it back.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack meets an attractive stewardess, Vicky Bradford; but between her father and her dates, she doesn't seem to have time for Jack. Janet announces her engagement to Philip, while Jack is jealous and lovesick.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack thinks Vicky wants a job in Houston and encourages her, causing her to think he wants to end their relationship. She interrupts Janet's wedding to find out why. They make up and the ceremony resumes. Jack proposes and is stunned by Vicky's refusal.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Vicky explains that she is afraid of marriage and suggests to Jack that they live together. Jack reluctantly agrees. They are toasting their first night together in their new apartment when they are interrupted by Mr. Bradford.

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet moves in with Mrs. Roper while Mr. Roper is away on business, then stews about Jack and Chrissy being alone for the night in the trio's upstairs apartment.

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: James Toney vs Mike McCallum 3

programme.title: Shaunie's Home Court
programme.desc: When Myles gets ready to move to New York for a summer internship, Shaunie struggles with letting go of her firstborn. When Dear enlists them to make the goodbye dessert it turns into a family bakeoff, which is simply a recipe for disaster.

programme.title: Shaunie's Home Court
programme.desc: Shaunie's excited that Shareef is finally ready to get his driver's license. Shaqir can't resist temptation when Shaunie gives him a budget for school clothes.

programme.title: Shaunie's Home Court
programme.desc: Shaqir gets a tutor to prepare for a big test, but the tutor is so cute Myles and Shaqir can't stop fighting for her attention. Shaunie figures out a way to get Myles to spend more time at his new apartment and less time at her place.

programme.title: Shaunie's Home Court
programme.desc: Shaunie tells Shareef he can get a tattoo, but then she can't stand the tattoo design he wants to get. Myles needs to learn how to walk the runway before he heads to Italy for his first big job as a fashion model.

programme.title: Shaunie's Home Court
programme.desc: Keyonna has a temp nanny help the family while she's on vacation, but Shaunie likes the new nanny so much she might be taking over. Grandma Dear isn't happy with the birthday party Shareef and Myles throw her.

programme.title: Shaunie's Home Court
programme.desc: Shaunie and the kids take a break from the big city and head to the woods for their first-ever camping trip, but the O'Neals aren't cut out for life in the wilderness. Keyonna's skeptical when Shaunie sets her up on a blind date.

programme.title: Shaunie's Home Court
programme.desc: Shaunie is out of her element after Shaqir convinces her to make the O'Neals a Shabbat dinner. Myles appoints himself creative director of a family photoshoot, but Shaunie calls a halt when his vision is anything but family-friendly.

programme.title: Shaunie's Home Court
programme.desc: Shaunie takes the fam to a farm, but it turns out she's just as uncomfortable milking cows and gathering eggs as they are. Myles is scared his family will take it too far and go vegan for life.

programme.title: Shaunie's Home Court
programme.desc: Shaqir steps up his training so he can make the varsity basketball team, but his new dedication makes problems for Shareef. Keyonna has trouble being Shaunie's friend and employee at the same time, but Mimi thinks she can help.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: A Surreal Beginning
programme.desc: The very first installment of the Surreal Life kicks off with 7 strangers moving into the house. The first challenge for this celebrity family is simple – figure out how to live with each other.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Stars Under the Stars
programme.desc: Just as the celebrities get comfortable, it's time to take them out of their element and into the nature's element – that's right they are going camping.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Backyard Talent Show
programme.desc: It's time for these celebrities to give back. They are challenged to put on a BBQ and Talent show.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Sincity to Saved
programme.desc: The Celeb-family needs to blow off a steam, so what better place to go to than Vegas baby. However getting to Sin City proves to be the real challenge with blow-up arguments between the cast causing tons of tension.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Brande Needs a Man
programme.desc: She may be a playmate, but Brande Roderick needs to find a man. Her celebrity roommates have been enlisted for help.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Boys Up Against the Girls
programme.desc: Hammer and Brande will lead a boy vs. girl softball team. Hammer calls all of his guy buddies, but Brande pull out the big guns by tapping into the playboy playmate house.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Corey's Wedding
programme.desc: The season crescendos to an end with a grand finale – Corey Feldman's wedding on National TV! Corey tries to mend the bridge with his castmates and reach out to them for their help with his upcoming big day.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: New Roommates
programme.desc: Trishelle Canatella and Traci Bingham once again find themselves in the spotlight as they work the nightshift at a famous restaurant on the Sunset Strip, take a trip to a nudist colony, go crazy at a porn pool party

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Mel's Dinner
programme.desc: Housemates report to work at Mel's Drive-In, where manager Gary Coleman loses control of his staff and suffers a meltdown.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: A Psychic, A Drunk and a Hairy Monster
programme.desc: A psychic arrives at the house and evokes a wave of emotions among the housemates.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Book Signing & Pool Party
programme.desc: Rob stays back at the mansion and prepares for a very surreal pool party, where Trishelle makes another unsuccessful pass at Rob and a successful pass at houseguest Andy Dick.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Nude Resort
programme.desc: Vince Neil invites the housemates to join him at a Palm Springs resort. Everyone perks up when they find out that they have arrived at a nudist resort.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: A fresh group of West Coast basketball wives, girlfriends, fiancées and exes deal with life in SoCal's hottest hub for gossip and game. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Bridezillas
programme.desc: GuardZilla Roxanne's lies lead to a royal meltdown when her groom & father go MIA at the altar. Boho Diva McKenzie's epic mama drama sparks chaos and threatens to pull the plug on her big day.

programme.title: Bridezillas
programme.desc: Emotions run high when McKenzie's family drama might leave her walking down the aisle by herself. With no dress, no flowers, and a fiancée getting wild at the strip club, Hot Mess Symoan might have to pull the plug on her own wedding.

programme.title: Bridezillas
programme.desc: Hot Mess Express Symoan's wedding morning meltdown mode puts the whole day in jeopardy. Nigerian Queen Evelyn demands perfection for her two weddings, but she has to face off with a venue owner who might be a bigger diva than she is.

programme.title: Bridezillas
programme.desc: Nigerian Queen Evelyn's double wedding dreams are at risk with a bridesmaid stand-off and her groom's disappointing dowry. QuackZilla Jessica's ever-growing guest list drives her to be at odds with everyone, including her groom.

programme.title: Bridezillas
programme.desc: Jessica no longer has control of her wedding. When things come crashing down, her fury is aimed at her wedding planner. Alex is saving herself for her wedding night, but without her father's approval, she may be waiting much longer than expected.

programme.title: Bridezillas
programme.desc: The final countdown to wedding night is here for Alex & her last night of freedom may cost her everything; Amber is a wedding planner who needs to control every detail of her big day. Will a dress & a catty sister-in-law bring down this diva?

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: Drita's dinner party takes an ugly turn when Renee blames Alicia's insecurity for their issues. Meanwhile, Drita has a grand opening for her new store and Ang continues her quest to build a baby.

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: Renee confesses that she's writing a sex novel and plans to have a release party to celebrate. At the launch, Natalie tries to steal her thunder. Alicia meets her fate when she appears in front of the judge for her sentencing.

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: Hosted by Sherri Shepherd. Drita, Renee, Ang, Alicia and Natalie sit down for an explosive, often funny and shockingly intense look back at the past season.

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: Emotions run high and Staten Island is rife with gossip, lies, and misunderstandings. In this world, you never know what's around the corner – or when an old family connection may resurface to shake everything up.

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: Feeling like it's now or never, Drita decides to sit down with Renee to hash out their issues, but new information shifts Drita's anger towards Natalie. To add to her stress, Renee deals with her son AJ's reckless behavior.

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: Karen and Natalie continue to face off at Big Ang's party. Karen discovers some disturbing information about her boyfriend Storm that causes her to question their relationship. Drita meets the newest addition to Ang's family.

programme.title: Basketball Wives

programme.desc: Anticipation builds as Jungle Grrrl gets a rematch against The Beast to determine the rightful contender to the WOW World Championship. To ensure a fair outcome, Champion Tessa Blanchard has been barred from ringside.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Jungle Grrrl calls out The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard for her Championship Match. With her back against the well, Tessa is forced to get creative and strikes a deal with The Fabulous Lana Star. Will The Fabulous One help Tessa Blanchard or turn on her?

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The Beast calls out The Fabulous Lana Star for costing her a shot at The WOW World Championship. And Jungle Grrrl finally battles The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard for the WOW World Championship in The Main Event.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Chaos, disorder, bedlam, and madness are all promised in a high-stakes Three-Way Elimination between The Monsters of Madness, Havok and Hazard, Holidead and Siren The Voodoo Doll, & Adrenaline and Fire.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: It’s The Monsters of Madness vs. Adrenaline and Fire. Both teams will test their metal. In the end, only one will claim victory as The WOW Tag Team Champions of the World! Will speed overcome power and strength? Or will size dominate the underdogs?

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Since day one when Abilene Maverick 'accidentally' poured tea on Stephy Slays, Stephy has endured Abilene’s teasing and bullying. After avoiding a match with Stephy on several occasions due to suspicious claims of injury, the match has finally been set.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Fans previously witnessed the rise of The Beast as the new WOW World Champion. The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard plots to get the championship belt back by partnering with The World’s Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A bounty hunter is not a hero in his own hometown, as Josh learns when he honors a dying friend's request to return his body to Cameron and the townspeople rush to judgment, believing Josh killed him for the reward money.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is approached by the wife of a wanted man eager to turn himself in peacefully, provided Josh splits the bounty with his wife.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A man with unwavering faith in a legend about lost treasure hires Josh to lead his family on an expedition into the desert to locate the cache of Spanish gold.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When a young runaway is framed for killing a Pinkerton agent, Randall turns detective to uncover the real killer.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is requested to meet a famous singer at the opera house in Denver who has a job for him.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh comes to the aid of his old friend Jesse, who is being strong-armed into selling the Outrider Hotel and Saloon owned by his beautiful girlfriend.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A decidedly different and dangerous assignment awaits Josh when he agrees to go into the Apache camp and compete in their contests to win the hand of a woman.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Pursuing killer Joe Collins into the Superstition Mountains, Josh is followed by a man who believes Collins could be his long-lost son.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A blindly obedient religious cult cast lots and it falls upon a young woman to act as its angel of vengeance.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh receives a letter from a girl at the St.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A concerned father hires Josh to retrieve his son, a passionate young ideologue whose gift for rousing rhetoric is being used by plunderers to recruit freedom fighters.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh's big talk after a dog is shot lands him in big trouble when his browbeating the locals in the saloon about ending the decades-long Carter-Blake feud.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: To track down the cheating tinhorn gambler Johnny Deuce and recover his money, Randall befriends the card sharp's protégé, a 12-year-old orphan boy and card cheat, nicknamed The Montana Kid.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh embarks on a mission of mercy when he pleads with the parents of a boy with appendicitis to let the doctor operate.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh reluctantly accepts an offbeat assignment: finding a beautiful bride for his bashful buddy Charlie, the homeliest and loneliest man in the West.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: The government employs Randall to portray an escaped prisoner in order to trick his cellmate into leading authorities to the $50,000 he stole and stashed away in a secret location.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall finds his prey in the hands of a lynch mob wiping out his bounty.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Who needs enemies with friends like the residents of Rogue City, who celebrate Randall for bringing in notorious killer Jumbo Kane.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall is rooked out of his bounty by crafty criminal Hunt Willis and his accomplice.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Against better judgment after losing a quick draw contest and bet, Josh serves as a guide for a dandified East Coast gun salesman who comes west to retrieve and replace a defective gun he sold to notorious outlaw Curly Bill Brocius.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: On the trail of a Cavalry deserter and the horses he stole, Josh rides into a town ruled as the private fiefdom of its autocratic, psychopathic marshal who is holding the horses and deserter.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Hired by a father to bring back the man who killed his son Josh is surprised when he doesn't get paid because he brought the man back alive.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh must bring a man back for murder.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh brings a wanted man into the Mesa City Sheriff, only to find he killed the sheriff's brother.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is looking for a man who, while trying to rob a bank, is bitten by a rabid dog.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A man shoots his brother over ownership of their property and blames it on an Indian who reclaimed his horse the man found and stole.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is captured by a corrupt deputy and is forced by the sheriff to work on a chain gang in a gold mine.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey challenges Yugi for the right to face Pegasus. In a battle between friends, a fierce match ensues between the two people who know each other's strategies and cards.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi is shocked as Joey uses the Time Wizard card on him. It's the very same card Yugi gave Joey as a sign of friendship!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi prepares for the ultimate battle against Pegasus with the souls of Grandpa, Kaiba, and Mokuba on the line.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pegasus punishes Yugi using the same Toon Deck and mind-reading abilities he used on Kaiba. As Pegasus turns Yugi's monsters against him, Yugi loses the will to battle. Will Pegasus capture Yugi's soul into a card, just like Kaiba?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi has found a counter to Pegasus's mind-reading ability: Yugi switches back and forth between his two souls! Yugi is able to destroy Pegasus's Toon World, but the duel has just only begun. The next level of the deadly Shadow Game is about to start!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi crumples under the power of the Shadow Game. His friends yell desperate encouragement, but their voices cannot penetrate the sphere of darkness. Yugi's chance at victory is slipping away, as is his life!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pegasus summons Relinquished, a fearsome monster that can consume Yugi's Duel Monsters! Yugi counters with… Kuriboh?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi meets a mysterious Egyptian named Shadi who enters Yugi's mind with the Millennium Key. What are these Millennium Items, and do they hold the answer to the mystery behind the Shadow Games?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends return from the Duelist Kingdom only to meet a young girl named Rebecca who demands that Grandpa return Blue-Eyes White Dragon to her.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Rebecca mistakenly believes that Grandpa stole the Blue-Eyes White Dragon from her grandfather. Yugi must defend the Blue-Eyes White Dragon to teach her that it's not the power of the cards, but the heart that's in them that counts.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The two-faced Board of Directors of Kaiba Corporation trap Kaiba inside a virtual reality game. Mokuba recruits Yugi and Joey to free Kaiba from this ultimate game where losing equals death!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The quest for Kaiba continues with a little help from… Mai? But can YUGI and friends adapt to a virtual world where the rules and strategies keep changing every step of the way?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends rescue Kaiba, but they are still stuck in the game! The only exit is past a Five-Headed Dragon, but in the difficult duel, Joey, Mokuba, and Mailose all their life points!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Duke Devlin defeats Joey and humiliates him in public, forcing Yugi to challenge Duke to a duel. However, this will not be a Duel Monsters duel, but a new game named Dungeon Dice Monsters!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: In exchange for Joey's freedom, Yugi agrees to give up Duel Monsters forever if he loses. Unfamiliar with the rules, Yugi gets off to a rough start.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi uses his innate gaming skills to turn the tables on Duke, but Duke has one more rule to mention: All creatures take up territory on the grid-like board. With no room to summon any new monsters, Yugi's position is helpless!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After Duke's all-powerful Orogoth The Relentless dices Yugi's entire cadre of monsters into shreds, Yugi only has one turn left before he loses all his heart points!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: An arcane fortune teller steals the Millennium Puzzle and Yugi must defeat him in a duel to win it back.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The mysterious menace controlling Bandit Keith shatters the Millennium Puzzle into pieces before setting the dueling arena ablaze. Can Yugi put the Millennium Puzzle back together and save the spirit before the entire room is engulfed in flames?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The origin of Duel Monsters is revealed. Using the magic of the Millennium Necklace, Egyptian historian Ishizu Ishtar shows Kaiba how Duel Monsters was played millenniums ago.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The spirit of the Millennium Puzzle realizes that his memories of ancient Egypt have faded, but Tea helps him uncover the mysteries of his past.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi learns that he was a powerful Pharaoh who saved the world five thousand years ago, and he must now save the world again.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey is cornered by a group of sinister Rare Hunters who force Joey into a duel. If he loses, the Rare Hunters get his precious Red-Eyes Black Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's time to master new rules and monsters; let the Battle City Tournament commence! In the first duel of the tournament, Yugi challenges the Rare Hunter to win back Joey's Red-Eyes Black Dragon.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi figures out the Rare Hunter's strategy to summon the almighty Exodia, but it's too late to stop him. The Rare Hunter already has four pieces of Exodia in his hand, and the fifth and final piece is on top of his deck.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The psychic duelist Espa Roba defeats Rex Raptor as easy as a chumpasaurus, and Joey's next on his hit list. What chance does Joey have when Espa Roba has the telepathic ability to read all the cards in Joey's hand?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey discovers that Espa Roba's extrasensory perception was a hoax, that he's not yet free from Espa's mental manipulations.
